examples: Eels are cooked over a beech and oak fire at Dutchman Alex Koelewijn's smokehouse.
The average Dutchman pedals 541 miles per year.
All too soon, though, the Dutchman falls foul of the Japanese.
The Dutchman's header was parried by Sorensen but only to Johnson who improvised instinctively.
The Dutchman succumbed 6-2 7-5 but was content to have got through the match.
